parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Actor
participant ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction
participant ConditionalFormattingCellWindow
participant Cell
participant ReationalOperator
participant Language
participant UIController
participant ConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension

Actor -> ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction : starts use case
ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction -> ConditionalFormattingCellWindow : create()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> Language : list=getBinaryOperators()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> ReationalOperator : getIdentifier()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> Actor : asks to choose a operator
Actor -> ConditionalFormattingCellWindow : select one
Actor -> ConditionalFormattingCellWindow : insert value
Actor -> ConditionalFormattingCellWindow : confirms
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> UIController : activecell= getActiveCell()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> Cell : content= getContent()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> ReationalOperator : checkCondition(value,content)
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> Cell : setBackgroundColor()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> UIController : refreshConditionSideBar()
ConditionalFormattingCellWindow -> ConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension : refreshConditionInfo()
@enduml
```
